successCriteria.description: Enum `LeaveRequestStatus` exists in `src/shared/types/index.ts` with values: DRAFT, SUBMITTED, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED
Enum `EmploymentStatus` exists in `src/shared/types/index.ts` with values: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, TERMINATED
`NotFoundError` class exists in `src/shared/errors/index.ts`, extends Error, takes entityName and id, produces message "EntityName with id 'id' not found"
`ValidationError` class exists in `src/shared/errors/index.ts`, extends Error, takes message and optional fieldErrors map (Record<string, string[]>)
`ConflictError` class exists in `src/shared/errors/index.ts`, extends Error, takes message

Generic abstract class `BaseRepository<T extends BaseEntity>` exists in `src/shared/db/base.repository.ts` with methods: findById(id), findAll(filters?), create(entity), update(id, updates), delete(id) — all using parameterized queries via pg Pool from `src/shared/db/connection.ts`
Jest unit tests exist in `tests/unit/shared/errors.test.ts` covering NotFoundError, ValidationError (with and without fieldErrors), and ConflictError

Jest unit tests exist in `tests/unit/shared/base.repository.test.ts` covering findById (found/not-found), findAll (no filters, single filter, multiple filters), create, update (success, not-found, empty updates), delete (success, not-found) — all with mocked pg Pool

constraints: All database access must go through the repository pattern — BaseRepository wraps pg Pool; no direct SQL in services or controllers (GP-001)
All queries must use parameterized queries ($1, $2, …) — no string interpolation of user-supplied values into SQL
No `any` type — use `unknown` with type guards per HARNESS.json constraint `no-any`
Strict TypeScript: no implicit any, strict null checks (per HARNESS.json stack description)
BaseRepository.findAll() must convert camelCase filter keys to snake_case for SQL column names (per AGENTS.md and ARCHITECTURE.md shared conventions)
outOfScope: Phase 7 — Database migrations for leave management tables
Phase 8 — Leave service business logic (submit/approve/reject/cancel lifecycle)
Phase 9 — Leave controller and Fastify HTTP routes
Phase 10 — Balance service and HTTP routes

ambiguities.description: All files specified in Phase 1 already exist in the codebase with the exact structure described: src/shared/types/index.ts (both enums), src/shared/errors/index.ts (all three error classes), src/shared/db/base.repository.ts (BaseRepository<T> with all five methods + BaseEntity interface + toSnakeCase helper), tests/unit/shared/errors.test.ts, and tests/unit/shared/base.repository.test.ts. The intent says "Create" but these files are already present and match the specification. This phase may have already been executed.
